meaning: adj.快活的,精神的,有弹性的,自大的
examples: This object is an instance of another Bouncy Castle class, named ParameterWithIV.
She was bouncy and full of energy.
John was as bouncy and ebullient as Helen was diffident and reserved.
After another bouncy outing, this one against Detroit, Chamberlain decided to shave it Sunday.
Mind you, he still looks quite bouncy, with that great shock of very black hair.
